_comment: Default-value reference for run_theoremB_symbol_shift.py (B3). Mirrors the B3Config dataclass defaults so they can be diffed. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults, pass CLI flags on the command line. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §6.4 and the script's module docstring. B3 uses the same (eta, T) as B2 so the matched baseline at alpha=0 reproduces B2's terminal losses to float eps.
